title: Guns N Balls
body:
![gunsnballslogo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f62ed8a14c34d0fd9e2819ecbcd1128f490ce9a5.png)
Pokemon and guns, just a slightly better Palworld, since the creators on Cobblemon made the mod very very good.

This is a server-side modpack where either you alone, or with friends, can start a world where you have access to Cobblemon (like pokemon) and 5 other "DLCS" for cobblemon, and Guns+++, which adds from pistols to long rifles. Its kind of like Palworld but a little better, with quests and random extra towns and structures added from Cobblemon.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![warning](https://cdn.pixabay.com/animation/2023/04/28/18/34/18-34-10-554_512.gif)

*DISCLAIMER* Besides Mod Menu there is no client-side mods in this modpack, if you wish to play with your friends then they have to download this pack too.

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cobblemon: I put my config to deploy and fight Pokemon as "Y" it just makes it easier since the original instance bind is "R" which is the emote wheel for essential.
When you first load in, press "M" to select your Pokemon and get your beginner book.

Guns+++: When you spawn in you will get a book that has all the crafting recipes for every item in the mod.

Essential: I put essential in every modpack so you can play with friends the same exact way you can on Bedrock.

I put FancyMenu in this madpack in order to make the new title screen, it is a basic title screen but it gets the job done.

Mod Menu: On the title screen there will be a tab labeled "Mods" and mod menu is that tab. Mod menu will show you all loaded mods within the game, along with a brief description of the mod and links to the mods.
